metadata.title: ActionCommandItem — metadata for one registered atomic action

description: Element of FixCommandListResponse.commands (GET /v1/fix/commands). Surfaces registered AtomicAction metadata from the ActionRegistry, filtered to the API-visible whitelist. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class ActionCommandItem.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the action does. May be null if the action has no description metadata.

category.description: Action category from the closed vocab (action_category enum). Null if uncategorized.

policies.description: Policy IDs this action is governed by. Empty list if no policies declared.

impact_level.description: Risk impact level from action_risk.yaml. Null if not declared.

requires_db.description: Whether this action requires a live database connection.

requires_vectors.description: Whether this action requires the vector store.

remediates.description: Rule IDs this action can remediate. Empty list if not a remediation action.
